name: Alive & Well Natural Health Emporium
description: Health food shop with deli & juice bar inside. Stock includes supplements, vitamins, organic grocery, snack foods, environmentally friendly products, frozen and chilled food, and a small fresh produce section.                                    Open Mon-Fri 8:00am-7:00pm, Sat 8:00am-6:00pm, Sun 10:00am-5:00pm.

Vegetarian








 

















 



 



 



 



 



11 Aug 2017


                    Small store plenty of stock                    
 - Edit






                        
                        Saw this place listed on happycow some years ago and have shopped here a couple of times. Was just here again this week - here's my Maui Alive & Well review update.


The store sells a little of bit everything, from fresh veggies and fruits to nutritional supplements, packaged snack foods, and water bottles. It's well-lit inside and air-conditioned. Prices are slightly more than other health stores on the island, but when you are in this area it's a good option.

31 Jan 2012


                    small health food store                    
 - Edit






                        
                        The deli is where its at, but there is a separate listing.  The healthfood store/deli is fairly small, but stocks a good quantity of health and beauty products along with the specialty organic items.   I was most surprised that they carried Vega's new bars and whole foods did not, yet.

Pros: deli, friendly
Cons: small
